title: ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Post-PCR Instrument: RNA-POST-PCR-3 Post-Indexing Cleanup
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: With this 9 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument and Post-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/43d313/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_020922.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 7 of 9: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Post-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to perform post-indexing cleanup steps.
Mix beads with input samples, engage magnets, remove supernatant.
Wash the beads twice with 80 percent ethanol.
Elute with Tris. Proceed to off-deck thermocycler steps.
